schema.description: A leading provider for restaurant search and reservations

slots.name: date
slots.description: Date for the reservation or to find availability

slots.name: time
slots.description: Time for the reservation or to find availability

slots.name: serves_alcohol
slots.description: Boolean flag indicating if the restaurant serves alcohol

slots.name: has_live_music
slots.description: Boolean flag indicating if the restaurant has live music

slots.name: city
slots.description: City in which the restaurant is located

slots.name: cuisine
slots.description: Cuisine of food served in the restaurant

intents.name: ReserveRestaurant
intents.description: Reserve a table at a restaurant

intents.name: FindRestaurants
intents.description: Find a restaurant of a particular cuisine in a city

turns.speaker: USER
turns.utterance: I am feeling hungry so I would like to find a place to eat.

turns.speaker: SYSTEM
turns.utterance: Do you have a specific which you want the eating place to be located at?

turns.speaker: USER
turns.utterance: I would like for it to be in San Jose.

turns.utterance: Is there a specific cuisine type you enjoy, such as Mexican, Italian or something else?

turns.speaker: USER
turns.utterance: I usually like eating the American type of food.

turns.utterance: I see that at 71 Saint Peter there is a good restaurant which is in San Jose.

turns.utterance: If you want to go to this restaurant you can find it at 71 North San Pedro Street.

turns.speaker: USER

turns.utterance: That suits me well. Can you tell me if they feature live music?

turns.speaker: SYSTEM
turns.utterance: Your booking has been made without errors, but unfortunately they do not have live music.
